category_sources: source_facts.description says HarfBuzz is an OpenType text shaping engine; official manual describes it as a text shaping library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides harfbuzz; official manual and repository use HarfBuzz.
docs_sources: Official HarfBuzz repository points users to harfbuzz.github.io for user manual and API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/harfbuzz/harfbuzz; per instruction repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official HarfBuzz manual describe OpenType shaping, Unicode input, glyph output, and font-related APIs.
